div.head: 165. Editorial Note
div.p: On September 4, a White House statement was issued by President Eisenhower at the United States Naval Base, Newport, Rhode Island, praising the delegates to the Buenos Aires Economic Conference for “reaching a large measure of agreement on the important economic problems confronting the American States.” The full text of the statement is printed in Department of State Bulletin, September 30, 1957, page 359.
